attributes.action: Ban Halal meat in 🇬🇧 UK.   It is just too cruel for animals
attributes.additional_details: Because it is the most cruel way gor an animal to die and suffer pain while bleeding out. Its is barbaric and there is no need for that in this country
attributes.background: Ban Halal slaughtered meat in UK as it is too cruel for animals

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Ban non-stun & recoverable stun slaughter of animals" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762116
